violations.text: A dead rodent was observed in a trap in the upstairs stairway next to the storage area. Dead pests must be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
An accumulation of miscellaneous debris was observed around the dumpster area. Area to be cleaned to prevent harborage conditions for rodents. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

A small amount of Old rodent droppings were observed along the wall/pallets next to the medical record storage and next to the tide detergent. Areas to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The corner of the floors in the upstairs of the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Various foods under the front cashier counter were gnawed and/or had droppings on them. Foods were disposed of. All product was removed off of shelf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by gnawed foods and a large accumulation of droppings in the front register area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Boxes of chips were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of food debris and rodent droppings. Employees vacuumed shelves at the time of inspection. Shelves must be sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The floors in various spots throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The presence of rodent is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
A dead rodent was found half way inside a trap. Rodents to be removed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
Old rodent droppings were observed in various locations in the establishment. Areas to be cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by live activity observed during inspection, a large accumulation of droppings throughout the entire building (Primarily in upstairs storage area), nesting material observed in break room, upstairs storage, stairway leading to upstairs. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
Dead rodents were observed in the retail area underneath shelving and upstairs. Rodents to be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

The door from the stairway leading to the storage area was observed with a hole in the bottom. Material of door was observed spread out throughout the upstairs. Bottom of door to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
Rodent droppings were observed throughout the entire facility. Floors to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large accumulation of droppings and nesting material observed underneath a door upstairs. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The floor in the upstairs storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
